title: Disynaphia senecionidea
taxonomy: Disynaphia senecionidea is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Compositae (also known as Asteraceae). It belongs to the tribe Senecioneae within the Compositae family. The genus Disynaphia is part of the larger group of plants commonly known as dandelions and thistles. Disynaphia senecionidea is native to South Africa and is closely related to other plants in the Compositae family. Its classification is further defined by its unique characteristics and morphological features.
